Human to Agent final verification report
Observed on: 2026-07-13 (Asia/Shanghai)

All statements below describe commands actually run against branch
codex/guided-session-onboarding in the human-to-agent repository.

1. uv run pytest -q
   Result: PASS — 291 passed, 3 skipped in 47.81s.

2. uv run ruff format --check .
   Result: PASS — 86 files already formatted.

3. uv run ruff check .
   Result: PASS — all checks passed.

4. uv run mypy src tests
   Result: PASS — no issues found in 84 source files.

5. git diff --check
   Result: PASS — no whitespace errors were reported.

6. uv run hta doctor --root .
   Result: PASS — doctor: ok.

7. uv run hta validate -w human-to-agent-pilot
   Result: PASS — validate: ok.

8. uv run hta stage assess -w human-to-agent-pilot
   Result: PASS — stage assess: ok.

9. uv run hta diff -w human-to-agent-pilot
   Result: PASS — diff: ok.

10. uv run hta events verify -w human-to-agent-pilot
    Result: PASS — events verify: ok.

11. uv run python scripts/verify_deterministic_build.py human-to-agent-pilot
    Result: PASS — two isolated release builds completed with identical tree digests.

12. uv build --out-dir <unique temporary directory>
    Result: PASS — source distribution and wheel human_to_agent-0.1.0 were built.

13. uv run python scripts/verify_wheel_install.py <that temporary directory>
    Result: PASS — the wheel installed into a fresh virtual environment; its CLI version,
    mother-workspace initialization, child-workspace creation, and rendered workspace
    file smoke checks all completed successfully.

This report does not claim that skipped tests ran, does not claim an unavailable final
reviewer approved the changes, and does not infer evidence beyond the command results
observed above.
